title: Hazardous weather on its way to Petersburg
summary: NOAA has issued a warning that Petersburg is projected to receive six to eight inches of rain this weekend. Landslides and flooding are possible. The greatest rainfall is supposed to start tonight and carry on through Saturday into Sunday morning. Residents who live in areas that are showing signs o...

title: Kawerak Hosts Grantmakers on Nudlaghi Leadership Institute Philanthropy Tour 2024
summary: Kawerak Inc hosted ten grantmakers on August 27th and 28th. The tour included information about local and regional programs and organizations, as well as a trip to one regional community – Shishmaref. This tour allows philanthropic organizations a first hand look at life in Western Alaska. With this...

title: Recognizing Overdose Awareness Day
summary: On August 31, the Yukon-Kuskokwim Health Corporation, along with millions of others around the world, recognizes Overdose Awareness Day, which was established to end stigmatism of addiction and help raise awareness of support services that are available. title: U.S. Rep. Mary Peltola visits Petersburg’s medical facilities; pledges support for hospital replacement project
summary: Petersburg Medical Center CEO Phil Hofstetter shows U.S. Representative Mary Peltola around the site of the hospital replacement project on August 10. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg’s hospital is deteriorating and state funding for a replacement facility is just out of reach , so hospital administrators are turning to federal lawmakers for aid. title: Direct Deposit for SNC Trust Distributions
summary: As in previous years, we remain dedicated to providing our Shareholders with the fastest and most convenient way to receive their Trust benefits.
